title: Cloud Infrastructure Vendor Selection
description: Evaluation of three cloud infrastructure vendors for Meridian's platform migration

vendors.name: Stratos Cloud
proposal_highlights: SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certified
concerns: Single data center region in EU (Frankfurt only)

vendors.name: NimbusCore
concerns: SLA is 99.9% — ten times more allowed downtime than Stratos
No dedicated support — shared ticket queue only
SOC 2 Type I only (not Type II)
CEO previously involved in a failed startup (DataPlex, 2020)

vendors.name: Apex Hosting
proposal_highlights: Full compliance suite: SOC 2 II, ISO 27001, HIPAA
Meridian already uses Apex for staging environment
concerns: Most expensive option — $54K/year more than NimbusCore
Requires proprietary migration tooling — potential lock-in
Recent pricing increase of 22% for existing clients in Q1 2026
Previous contract with Meridian had billing disputes in 2024

evaluation_criteria: Total cost of ownership over 3 years
Migration complexity and vendor lock-in risk

company_context.migration_driver: Board directive to reduce infrastructure risk after Q4 2025 outage
company_context.traffic_projection: 300% increase over 24 months due to APAC expansion
company_context.compliance_requirement: SOC 2 Type II required by two enterprise clients by Q1 2027
